entries.title: Daily Summary - 2026-03-17
entries.content:
## Accomplishments
- Setup Dubai VPN (Surfshark WireGuard in Docker) for Pionex geo-unblock
- Created SOCKS5 proxy (gost) for Pionex API access
- XRP bot now routes through Dubai successfully
- Configured all 7 Norse agents with qwen3.5:27b local model
- Upgraded Mimir to qwen3-coder:30b for complex code tasks
- Fixed TheHub services page (localhost → API proxy)
- Created /api/ollama-status endpoint for service monitoring

## Key Decisions
- All routine Norse agents use qwen3.5:27b (shared GPU model)
- Only complex research tasks need cloud models (huginn/tyr)
- VPN is required for Pionex (geo-blocked in US)

## Bot Activity
- XRP bot running with paper trading mode
- VPN routing established via run-with-vpn.sh wrapper
- 14 git commits (automated backups)

## Agent Work
- Huginn: Daily market scan completed
- All 7 agents configured with local/free models for autonomy

## Technical Notes
- WireGuard container: surfshark-dubai
- SOCKS proxy: 127.0.0.1:1080
- Bot wrapper: /storage/workspace/projects/trading/pionex/xrp/run-with-vpn.sh

## Next Steps
- Test Thor agent spawning
- Configure Telegram routing for Norse agents
- Setup weekly review cron
